diagnosis.diagnostic_reasoning: The patient presented with status epilepticus due to profound hypomagnesemia, magnesium loss with associated proteinuria suggesting renal tubulopathy, recurrent urinary tract infections, neurogenic bladder dysfunction, and partial Fanconi syndrome. Genetic testing revealed a homozygous variant in c.974G>A (p.Arg325Gln) in Exome 11 of the OSGEP gene, confirming the diagnosis.
